case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s currencyservice. Sustained mem dev=+221 to +451 and latency.p50 dev=+749 to +789 confirm memory exhaustion as root cause. Traces show high self latency (77ms) driven by mem. Ranking top1=currencyservice_mem.

Final RCA confirms currencyservice memory exhaustion (dev=+221 to +451) as primary cause. Sustained mem spikes drive high self latency. Frontend and checkoutservice show secondary latency propagation. Top1=currencyservice_mem.
